Thunderbolt/USB4:

    Thunderbolt/USB4 Bus 5:

      Vendor Name: Apple Inc.
      Device Name: Mac Studio
      UID: 0x05ACCF23ABE9B5D5
      Route String: 0
      Domain UUID: E723E836-6BE9-4310-8786-DCBB950EF9A0
      Port:
          Status: No device connected
          Link Status: 0x100
          Speed: Up to 120 Gb/s
          Receptacle: 6
